info.name: CAN Transformation (Fewer Steps)
info.description: Custom transformation block that extracts raw 1Hz windows for the Fused DSP architecture.

parameters.name: Bucket
parameters.help: Bucket where your dataset is hosted

parameters.name: Window Size
parameters.help: Window size in seconds for sample generation

parameters.name: Num Negative Samples
parameters.help: Number of negative samples per trip

parameters.name: Skip Times
parameters.help: Number of trailing rows to cut for leakage prevention
